title: Support Macro Assistant
problem: Support agents repeatedly rewrite similar responses, leading to inconsistent tone, slower first-response times, and accidental omission of required troubleshooting steps.
solution: This assistant suggests context-aware reply macros tailored to ticket intent, account tier, and policy constraints, while preserving brand tone and mandatory compliance language.

impact.notes: Designed for tier-1 and tier-2 queues; goal is 20% faster resolution and improved CSAT consistency.
